initModel.raw:
(model) => ({
        ...model,
        valueFormat: model.valueFormat || 'string',
        stripCountryCode: model.stripCountryCode !== undefined ? model.stripCountryCode : false,
        defaultCountry: model.defaultCountry || 'za',
        enableArrow: model.enableArrow !== undefined ? model.enableArrow : true,
        enableSearch: model.enableSearch !== undefined ? model.enableSearch : true,
        labelAlign: model.labelAlign || 'left',
    })

settingsFields.label: Value Format
settingsFields.description: Format for the returned phone number value

settingsFields.label: Strip Country Code
settingsFields.description: When using International format, return the national format instead (e.g., +27123456789 becomes 0123456789 for ZA). The national format varies by country.

settingsFields.label: Default Country
settingsFields.description: ISO country code (e.g., za, us, gb)

settingsFields.label: Preferred Countries
settingsFields.description: Comma-separated country codes to show at top (e.g., za,us,gb)

settingsFields.label: Only Countries
settingsFields.description: Comma-separated country codes to include (e.g., za,us,gb). If set, only these will be shown

settingsFields.label: Exclude Countries
settingsFields.description: Comma-separated country codes to exclude from list (e.g., us,ca)

settingsFields.label: Enable Search
settingsFields.description: Allow searching for countries in the dropdown

settingsFields.label: Show Distinct Country Codes
settingsFields.description: Display only distinct country codes in the dropdown

settingsFields.label: Disable Dropdown
settingsFields.description: Prevent users from changing the country via dropdown

settingsFields.label: Disable Parentheses
settingsFields.description: Remove parentheses from phone number input mask

settingsFields.label: Search Placeholder
settingsFields.description: Placeholder text for country search input

settingsFields.label: Search Not Found Text
settingsFields.description: Text to display when no country matches the search

settingsFields.label: Default Value
settingsFields.description: Enter default value of component. (formData, formMode, globalState) are exposed

settingsFields.label: On Change
settingsFields.description: Enter custom event handler on changing of value. The callback triggered when the phone number is changed. Available variables: value (phone number), phoneValue (raw input object)

settingsFields.label: On Blur
settingsFields.description: Custom event handler triggered when the phone input loses focus

settingsFields.label: On Focus
settingsFields.description: Custom event handler triggered when the phone input receives focus

settingsFields.label: Style (All Elements)
settingsFields.description: A script that returns the style applied to all phone input elements. This should conform to CSSProperties

settingsFields.label: Wrapper Style
settingsFields.description: Style for .ant-phone-input-wrapper (outer wrapper)

settingsFields.label: Input Group Wrapper Style
settingsFields.description: Style for .ant-input-group-wrapper

settingsFields.label: Input Wrapper Style
settingsFields.description: Style for .ant-input-wrapper

settingsFields.label: Input Group Style
settingsFields.description: Style for .ant-input-group (contains flag and input)

settingsFields.label: Input Style
settingsFields.description: Style for .ant-input (the actual input field)
